Structured object check types › Required field

kind:    object_required_field
family:  structuredObject
scope:   item
severity: error
purpose: Require that a frontmatter field exists.

Structured-object check types validate structured frontmatter fields using schema-backed checks.

configuration keys:
  FIELD  REQUIRED  DEFAULT  MEANING
  field  yes       -        Frontmatter key that must be present.

example:
  collections:
    notes:
      path: notes
      checks:
        - kind: object_required_field
          field: year

other structured object check types:
  object_field_enum, object_field_type, object_number_range, object_sentence_case, object_string_length, filesystem_unique_field, object
